seo.title: Support Worker Agency London | Vigil Care Staffing
seo.description: Vigil Care Staffing provides CQC-compliant, fully vetted support workers across every London borough. Rapid placements for care homes, supported living, and specialist settings.

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.heading: Support Worker Agency in London
fields.sub: Vigil Care Staffing is a support worker agency supplying vetted, DBS-checked support workers to care homes, supported living and specialist services across Greater London.

image.alt: Temporary Care Staffing Agency in Westminster providing healthcare assistants

fields.image_alt: Temporary Care Staffing Agency in Westminster providing healthcare assistants

fields.heading: A support worker agency you can depend on
fields.body:
When your service needs dependable support workers, the right agency makes the difference between a safely covered rota and a stressful scramble. Vigil Care Staffing is a support worker agency supplying vetted, experienced support workers to care homes, supported living services and specialist settings across Greater London.

We provide cover for single shifts, recurring bookings and longer placements, matching each support worker to the setting and to the people they will support. From learning-disability and mental health services to residential care, we place people who fit your team.

Vigil Care Staffing is a staffing supplier, not a regulated care provider. Our focus is straightforward: giving your service reliable, fully vetted support workers who are ready to work from their first shift.

image.alt: Support worker agency London – support worker assisting service user

fields.image_alt: Support worker agency London – support worker assisting service user

items.title: Rapid placement
items.body: We draw on a local pool of available support workers to fill short-notice shifts and keep your rota safely covered when plans change unexpectedly.

items.title: Compliance first
items.body: Every support worker is fully vetted before placement, so compliance is settled before anyone starts rather than chased afterwards.

items.title: Tailored staffing
items.body: We match support workers to your setting and requirements, whether that is supported living, mental health or residential care.

items.title: Round-the-clock availability
items.body: Our team coordinates cover across days, nights and weekends, so support is arranged whenever your service needs it.

items.title: Continuity of care
items.body: Wherever possible we return the same support workers to your service, supporting consistency for the people you care for.

items.title: Reduced admin
items.body: We handle vetting, training records and payroll for the workers we supply, reducing the administrative load on your team.

fields.heading: Vetting and compliance you can trust
fields.body:
Every support worker completes an enhanced DBS check, right-to-work verification and reference checks from previous care employers before their first shift. We confirm mandatory training in safeguarding, moving and handling and infection control, and keep it current through ongoing development.

Our recruitment follows a CQC-compliant process designed to support your own safe-staffing records. Because our support workers are directly employed, responsibility for their vetting and conduct stays with us throughout every placement.

image.alt: Support worker agency London – support worker assisting service user

fields.image_alt: Support worker agency London – support worker assisting service user

items.a: We supply support workers to care providers across Greater London. Tell us your location and setting and we will confirm availability near you.

items.q: How quickly can you fill a shift?
items.a: We keep a local pool of available support workers and respond quickly to short-notice requests, always confirming what we can cover.

items.q: What vetting do your support workers have?
items.a: Each support worker is enhanced-DBS-checked, right-to-work verified and reference-checked, with mandatory training confirmed before they start.

items.q: Do you provide temporary and ongoing cover?
items.a: Yes. We provide temporary shift cover, ongoing bookings and longer placements, so you can use us for a single shift or continuing support.

locations.label: Care home CPD and CQC compliance

fields.heading: Need vetted support workers across London?
fields.sub: Tell us your rota gap and we will match experienced support workers to your service across Greater London.
